evidence_excerpt: 6af79cf6c8a213dddce8 TIDE 2.0 TIDE 2.0 SCHEME Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) Innovation and IPR Division, MeitY, in association with 51 incubation centres MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) HISTORICAL_INFORMATION_ONLY NO_CURRENT_APPLICATION_ROUTE_CONFIRMED Promote technology entrepreneurship through financial and technical support to incubators supporting ICT and emerging-technology startups addressing areas of societal relevance. The approved implementation model operated through designated incubation centres at institutes of higher learning and research organisations. status_evidence: © December 2025 MeitY Startup Hub, IIT Bombay, ISBA Knowledge and Resource Centre INCUBATION FUND MANAGEMENT Investment Playbook for Startup Incubators AUTHORS Dr. Panneerselvam Madangopal Poyni Bhatt Prof. Rohan Chinchwadkar December 2025 2 About The Authors: Dr. Panneersel vam Madangopal is CEO of MeitY Startup Hub and Director – Digital India Program of Ministry of Electronic and Information Technology, Government of India. His core expertise is in innovation management, business strategy and ecosystem building. He is also an educator in the domain of innovation and entrepreneurship. Poyni Bhatt is a founding team member and former CEO of SINE, the technology business incubator at IIT Bombay. She has mentored more than 250 startups within and outside SINE. She has also contributed to various central and state government departments in shaping their entrepreneurship programs. She is an Advisor- Knowledge and Resource Centre of Indian STEP & Business Incubator Association. A qualified legal and compliance professional, she has an experience of nearly three decades in industry and academia. Prof. Rohan Chinchwadkar is an Assistant Professor of Finance at the Shailesh J.
